# KayKit Adventurers 1.0

- Author: Kay Lousberg
- Source: https://github.com/KayKit-Game-Assets/KayKit-Character-Pack-Adventures-1.0
- License: Creative Commons Zero 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0)
- Local license copy: `LICENSE.txt`

The four vendored GLB files are the unmodified upstream inputs used by
`tools/build_character_roster.py`. The build keeps the professional rigged
topology, selected equipment and six gameplay animations, then creates the
twenty Neivara race/gender/archetype variants with project-specific palettes,
proportions and race-signature meshes.

Attribution is not required by CC0, but the project retains this notice so the
asset provenance remains explicit and auditable.
